positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition of a flourishing forest silhouette against a warm, gradient sunset sky. The scene features highly detailed, intertwined flora—including ferns, curling vines, and exotic tropical flowers—rendered with clean, bold lines. The overall aesthetic is mystical and organic, presented as a two-tone graphic design suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use a rich palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, forest green, and cream, with sharp contrasts and clean separation between the elements. Center composition, perfect for vertical garment placement, showcasing depth through overlapping layers. Vector art influence, high-contrast digital illustration, clean lines, isolated subject matter.
